<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer v1.2.17 -->

# apps/web/components/ui

Styled React UI primitives built on Base UI and CVA, providing consistent form controls, overlays, feedback components, and layout containers with theme-aware styling, animation states, and accessibility attributes.

## Contents

### Form Controls
- [input.tsx](./input.tsx) — `Input` controlled form element wrapping `@base-ui/react/input`, applies focus ring, disabled states, ARIA invalid borders
- [textarea.tsx](./textarea.tsx) — `Textarea` multiline input with field-sizing-content, focus ring, dark mode variants
- [button.tsx](./button.tsx) — `Button` primitive with `buttonVariants` CVA config; six variants (default, outline, secondary, ghost, destructive, link), five size presets (default, xs, sm, lg, icon sizes)

### Overlay Components
- [dialog.tsx](./dialog.tsx) — `Dialog`, `DialogTrigger`, `DialogOverlay`, `DialogContent`, `DialogHeader`, `DialogFooter`, `DialogTitle`, `DialogDescription`; modal system with backdrop blur, centered positioning, optional close button
- [sheet.tsx](./sheet.tsx) — `Sheet`, `SheetTrigger`, `SheetContent`, `SheetHeader`, `SheetFooter`; slide-out panels from four sides (top, right, bottom, left) with directional translate animations
- [dropdown-menu.tsx](./dropdown-menu.tsx) — `DropdownMenu`, `DropdownMenuItem`, `DropdownMenuCheckboxItem`, `DropdownMenuRadioItem`, `DropdownMenuSub`, `DropdownMenuSeparator`, `DropdownMenuShortcut`; menu system with submenus, checkboxes, radio groups, keyboard shortcut labels
- [tooltip.tsx](./tooltip.tsx) — `TooltipProvider`, `Tooltip`, `TooltipTrigger`, `TooltipContent`; lightweight popover with arrow, fade/zoom/slide animations, configurable positioning

### Feedback & Status
- [badge.tsx](./badge.tsx) — `Badge` inline span with `badgeVariants` CVA; six themes (default, secondary, destructive, outline, ghost, link), conditional padding via `has-data-[icon=inline-start/end]`
- [progress.tsx](./progress.tsx) — `Progress`, `ProgressTrack`, `ProgressIndicator`, `ProgressLabel`, `ProgressValue`; animated determinate progress bar
- [skeleton.tsx](./skeleton.tsx) — `Skeleton` pulsing placeholder div for loading states
- [sonner.tsx](./sonner.tsx) — `Toaster` wrapper for sonner library, integrates next-themes, maps CSS vars (--popover, --popover-foreground, --border, --radius), overrides icons with Lucide variants (CircleCheckIcon, InfoIcon, TriangleAlertIcon, OctagonXIcon, Loader2Icon)

### Layout & Structure
- [card.tsx](./card.tsx) — `Card`, `CardHeader`, `CardTitle`, `CardDescription`, `CardAction`, `CardContent`, `CardFooter`; composable card system with size variants (default, sm), @container query layout, data-slot selector architecture
- [scroll-area.tsx](./scroll-area.tsx) — `ScrollArea`, `ScrollBar`; custom scrollbar with orientation variants (horizontal/vertical), focus ring states
- [separator.tsx](./separator.tsx) — `Separator` horizontal/vertical divider with orientation-responsive sizing
- [collapsible.tsx](./collapsible.tsx) — `Collapsible`, `CollapsibleTrigger`, `CollapsibleContent`; disclosure widget wrapping `@base-ui/react/collapsible`

## Dependencies

All components depend on:
- `@base-ui/react/*` — unstyled primitives (button, dialog, input, menu, progress, scroll-area, separator, collapsible)
- `cn` from `@/lib/utils` — className merging utility
- `class-variance-authority` — CVA for variant styling (badge.tsx, button.tsx)

External integrations:
- `lucide-react` — icons (ChevronRightIcon, CheckIcon, XIcon, CircleCheckIcon, InfoIcon, TriangleAlertIcon, OctagonXIcon, Loader2Icon)
- `next-themes` — theme detection (sonner.tsx)
- `sonner` — toast library (sonner.tsx)

## Styling Architecture

### Data-Slot Pattern
Every component sets `data-slot="{component-name}"` attribute for CSS targeting. Card components use slot presence selectors (`has-data-[slot=card-footer]`, `has-[>img:first-child]`) for conditional styling.

### State-Driven Animation
Components use data-attribute selectors for animation states:
- `data-open`, `data-closed` — disclosure transitions (dialog, sheet, dropdown-menu)
- `data-starting-style`, `data-ending-style` — enter/exit animations (sheet overlay)
- `data-disabled`, `data-invalid` — form control states
- `data-horizontal`, `data-vertical` — orientation variants (separator, scroll-area)
- `data-side`, `data-align` — positioning variants (tooltip, dropdown-menu)

### Animation Classes
- Fade: `data-open:fade-in-0 data-closed:fade-out-0`
- Zoom: `data-open:zoom-in-95 data-closed:zoom-out-95`
- Slide: `data-[side=top]:slide-in-from-bottom-2`, `data-[side=right]:slide-in-from-left-2`
- Transform origin: `--transform-origin` CSS var for directional scaling

### CVA Variant System
badge.tsx and button.tsx use `cva()` for multi-axis variant generation:
- **button.tsx**: `variant` axis (default, outline, secondary, ghost, destructive, link), `size` axis (default, xs, sm, lg, icon, icon-xs, icon-sm, icon-lg)
- **badge.tsx**: `variant` axis (default, secondary, destructive, outline, ghost, link), conditional padding via `has-data-[icon]` selectors

### Focus States
Consistent focus-visible styling across components:
- Ring width: `ring-3` (3px)
- Ring color: `ring-ring/50` (50% opacity theme color)
- Border: `border-ring` on interactive elements
- Applied to: Input, Textarea, Button, Dialog, ScrollArea

### Dark Mode
Components use `dark:` variant classes for theme-specific overrides:
- Input: `dark:bg-input/30`, `dark:disabled:bg-input/80`
- Button outline: `dark:border-input`, `dark:hover:bg-muted/40`
- Sheet/Dialog overlays: `bg-black/10 dark:bg-black/30`

## Behavioral Contracts

### Button Size Classes
- `size-6` (icon-xs): `size-6`
- `size-7` (icon-sm): `size-7`
- `size-8` (icon): `size-8`
- `size-9` (icon-lg): `size-9`
- Default: `h-8 px-3 gap-2`
- XS: `h-6 px-2 gap-1.5 text-xs`
- SM: `h-7 px-2.5 gap-1.5 text-xs`
- LG: `h-9 px-4 gap-2.5`

### Badge Variant Colors
- `default`: `bg-primary text-primary-foreground`
- `secondary`: `bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground`
- `destructive`: `bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground`
- `outline`: `border-foreground/40 text-foreground/70`
- `ghost`: `text-muted-foreground`
- `link`: `text-primary underline-offset-4`

### Card Size Padding
- Default size: `p-4` (CardContent), `p-5` (root)
- SM size: `p-3` (CardContent), `p-4` (root)
- With footer: `pb-0` on root, rounded-b-xl on footer

### DropdownMenu Positioning Defaults
- `align="start"`, `alignOffset=0`, `side="bottom"`, `sideOffset=4`

### Sheet Side Translations
- Top: `translate-y-[2.5rem]`
- Right: `translate-x-[-2.5rem]`
- Bottom: `translate-y-[-2.5rem]`
- Left: `translate-x-[2.5rem]`

### Tooltip Positioning Defaults
- `side="top"`, `sideOffset=4`, `align="center"`, `alignOffset=0`

### Sonner Theme Variable Mapping
- `--normal-bg` → `--popover`
- `--normal-text` → `--popover-foreground`
- `--normal-border` → `--border`
- `--border-radius` → `--radius`
